summary: This document provides a comparative analysis of Go-To-Market strategies for healthcare technology firms in the US and European Union markets. It details success factors for companies like Epic Systems, Babylon Health, and Kry, focusing on partnerships and regulatory navigation. The content serves as strategic research to inform market entry approaches for health-tech startups.
